rule: never stage; seek and stage the original instead; log drop as inadmissible-origin
note: Most prolific CAR digital-news hit in every French query of the CAF sweep. Verified verbatim mirror of Oubangui Medias (AIAL data-centre story, reposted ~2 min after the original). High-volume, on-topic, correctly dated and superficially clean, so a naive FR run would build a country's record out of it. See ISSUE-013.
